flashcards.definition: Brainstem region that generates the basic rhythm of breathing.
In the medulla; primarily sense ↑CO₂ (via H⁺ in CSF) to increase ventilation.
In carotid/aortic bodies; detect low O₂, high CO₂, low pH.
Stretch receptors in lungs prevent overinflation by inhibiting inspiration.
Normal stimulus to breathe: rising CO₂ detected by chemoreceptors → increased ventilation.
